title: Context has expired logical error with Join-engine
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
Query with Join-engine fails between 25.7.7 and 25.7.8.
25.7.8: https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/63b70627-67cf-4ff5-a150-8a9e5206a83f — fails.
25.7.7: https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/6d05b6c1-775d-405c-947f-c3d3d7a18cbf — works.
Note: below we are using `LowCardinality(String)`, but it fails with `String` as well.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
```sql
CREATE TABLE tbl
(
`id1` LowCardinality(String),
`id2` LowCardinality(String),
`v` Int64
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY (id1, id2, v);
INSERT INTO tbl VALUES ('a', 'b', 1);
CREATE TABLE join_engine
(
`id1` LowCardinality(String),
`id2` LowCardinality(String),
`v` Int64
)
ENGINE = Join(ANY, LEFT, id1, id2)
;
INSERT INTO join_engine VALUES ('a', 'b', 1);
WITH cte AS
(
SELECT id2
FROM tbl
WHERE joinGet('join_engine', 'v', id1, id2) = tbl.v
)
SELECT uniq(id2) AS count
FROM
(
SELECT *
FROM tbl AS e
WHERE joinGet('join_engine', 'v', id1, id2) = e.v
)
WHERE id2 IN (
SELECT id2
FROM cte
)
UNION ALL
SELECT uniq(id2) AS count
FROM cte
;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl1 (id1 VARCHAR, id2 VARCHAR, v BIGINT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE join_engine1 (id1 VARCHAR, id2 VARCHAR, v BIGINT, status VARCHAR CHECK (status IN ('active', 'inactive')));
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id2) AS count FROM tbl1 WHERE (SELECT v FROM join_engine1 WHERE id1 = tbl1.id1 AND id2 = tbl1.id2) = v AND id1 IS NOT NULL;
